description_long: This is a square pillow with a soft, fabric exterior and a plush, filled interior. The pillow features a light beige or off-white base color with two wide vertical bands of closely spaced, thin, dark stripes running parallel down the front and back surfaces. The edges are slightly rounded, giving it a comfortable, inviting appearance. On the upper left and right corners of the front and back, there are black graphic elements with white Chinese characters, resembling a logo or decorative patch. The pillow appears well-stuffed, maintaining a plump, even shape. The surface texture looks smooth and soft, typical of cotton or a cotton-blend fabric.
description: A square, striped pillow with a soft, fabric exterior and black graphic elements in the upper corners. The pillow is plush, with a light base color and vertical dark stripes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light base color, two vertical dark striped bands, and a black graphic element with white Chinese characters in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness, the convergence of the striped pattern along the edge, and a small dark loop or seam at the top.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the same striped pattern and a black graphic element in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pillow's thickness and the striped pattern converging along the edge, with a visible seam or loop at the top.
attribute_brand_logo: black graphic with white Chinese characters in the upper left (front) and upper right (back) corners
